arts.ttl: Who wins LaLiga: Atlético, Barcelona or Real Madrid? Title race talking points
arts.sum: LaLiga returns with Atleti, Barça and Madrid all after the title. ESPN's Alex Kirkland, Sam Marsden, Sid Lowe, Graham Hunter answer the key questions.

arts.ttl: Raphinha mocked with two-word taunt as Brazil star targeted by Argentina players after x-rated prediction
arts.sum: The Barcelona winger enraged his World Cup qualifying opponents and was made to eat his own words after the 4-1 defeat

arts.ttl: Raphinha made to eat his words as Argentina thrash Brazil - 'We danced around them'
arts.sum: ARGENTINA 4-1 BRAZIL: The World Cup holders qualified for the 2026 tournament by hammering their bitter rivals, with Premier League stars past and present on the scoresheet

arts.ttl: Wednesday's Transfer Talk Update: Ademola Lookman, Trent Alexander-Arnold, Frenkie de Jong
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: When is Barcelona - Osasuna? How to watch on TV, stream online
arts.sum: Now, the two sides will meet in a crucial encounter for both teams at the Estadi Olímpic Lluís Companys in Barcelona. Originally set for March 8, the game was postponed following the tragic passing of Barcelona’s team doctor, Carles Miñarro García .

arts.ttl: Olmo: Barcelona have the team to fight for everything
arts.sum: Dani Olmo has been talking up Barcelona’s chances of winning titles this season as the Catalans prepare to return to action. Barca are also into the semi-finals of the Copa del Rey and the quarter-finals of the Champions League, leaving Omo optimistic of more silverware this season.

arts.ttl: Barcelona consider extending Ansu Fati contract until 2030
arts.sum: Ansu Fati has had a tough time of things in recent years, but his undying commitment to succeed at Barcelona could soon net him a long-term contract, which would given him an increased opportunity of convincing club officials of his ability to make a difference in Hansi Flick’s squad. arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold's Barcelona admission re-emerges amid Real Madrid transfer links
arts.sum: Liverpool star Trent Alexander-Arnold is closing in on a free transfer move to Spanish giants Real Madrid but some historic comments about their fierce rivals Barcelona could make things awkward

arts.ttl: Barcelona lineup vs. Osasuna: Predicted XI for La Liga clash amid Inigo Martinez, Pau Cubarsi injury concerns
arts.sum: Sports Mole looks at how Barcelona could line up for Thursday's La Liga clash against Osasuna at Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys.

arts.ttl: Barcelona planning September return to Spotify Camp Nou
arts.sum: Barcelona had hoped to be back at the Spotify Camp Nou by now, but delays mean that it more likely that they return next season.
